title: Show Monday indication in Zendesk ticket
excerpt: Today there is no way to show in a zendesk ticket that an item has been created in Monday. This would be extremely helpful to have this information visible in zendesk, similar to how a linked Jira ticket is shown.

posts.author: NMB (Natalie)
posts.cookedHtml: Today there is no way to show in a zendesk ticket that an item has been created in Monday. This would be extremely helpful to have this information visible in zendesk, similar to how a linked Jira ticket is shown.

posts.author: geebee (Ganesh Balaji)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Natalie. We just launched the [monday.com app on Zendesk.] (monday.com by Strivelabs.ai App Integration with Zendesk Support) which does just what you had asked for. The app is in beta (free for now). We would love to get your feedback. Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions
